Notes: Bovine Growth Hormone polyadenylation signal. Default in pcDNA3.1 after MCS. Highly efficient in mammalian cells. NCBI accession for full BGH sequence.
SV40 early polyadenylation signal. Used for selection cassette (neomycin etc.) in pcDNA3.1 and pSV2 vectors. NCBI J02400 contains full SV40 genome.
SV40 late polyadenylation signal. Slightly different position in SV40 genome. Often used interchangeably with early polyA. NCBI J02400 contains full SV40 genome.
Human Growth Hormone polyadenylation signal. Alternative to bGH polyA. Used in some Clontech and Takara vectors. Web fetch for sequence.

Host: Synthetic minimal polyA signal. Very compact. Used in lentiviral and AAV vectors where space is limited.

Notes: Large but highly efficient polyA signal from rabbit beta-globin gene 3'UTR. Used in some retroviral and lentiviral vectors.
Herpes simplex virus thymidine kinase polyA signal. Used in selection cassettes. Moderate efficiency.
BioBrick BBa_B0010. Stem-loop plus U-tract. Standard bacterial transcription terminator.
BioBrick BBa_B0012. Maximal termination efficiency. Minimal sequence.
